creator: jiashiun@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #8)

Maybe for now one have to manually "pkg set -n" to modify dependencies of which "pkg check -da" reports missing, after force deleting dri packages? I suppose that's what portmaster/portupgrade -o do for single port upgrade.

I am too lazy to think of this before just blindly rebuilding every packages pkg-check reports and let processors burn.
